title: Breaking changes limitation in the API
excerpt:
Hey, 
Today I notices some new(I think) feature for the people column. The option to limit the amount of possible people in the people column. This feature is great, but it added a limitation to the API! The exception I …

posts.author: ram_perel (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
Today I notices some new(I think) feature for the people column. The option to limit the amount of possible people in the people column. This feature is great, but it added a limitation to the API! The exception I get is “CellLimitExceededException: Validation of column values failed: Exceed cell limit”
It is the first time I saw this feature so I believe it is new, also I couldn’t see the exception documented in the error codes or anywhere in the documentations and also not in the API or framework change log.
This is concerning, it breaks the API for us without any notice and option to support that… I saw also other options beign added lately to the column settings and I hope ther are not other breaking changes out there!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ram_perel,

Would you be able to please fill this form so that our team can take a look into it?

posts.author: ram_perel (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just opened a ticket - #3441659
I saw that the exception appear only when creating an item but when updating I get success feedback but the item is not beign updated at all!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

I replied in the ticket!

See you there
